name: pricing-engine
description: Print product pricing engine with admin UI

scripts.deploy: scp -r server.js engine.js engine-largeformat.js config.json config-largeformat.json package.json client gmtech:~/priceTable-1/pricing-engine/ && ssh gmtech "cd ~/priceTable-1/pricing-engine && npm install --production && kill $(lsof -t -i:3000) 2>/dev/null; nohup node server.js > /dev/null 2>&1 &"
